hero.title: Buggy Rentals
hero.subtitle: with Dani
hero.description: The most fun way to discover Cozumel! Rent an open-air buggy and explore the island at your own pace. Perfect for cruise passengers and resort guests.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyUs.subtitle: The best buggy rental experience on the island

items.title: Convenient Location
items.desc: Meeting point directly across from Puerta Maya & SSA cruise ports. Hotel delivery available!

items.title: All-Inclusive Price
items.desc: $75/day includes liability insurance, up to 5 people per buggy. No hidden fees.

items.title: Open Every Day
items.desc: We're open Monday through Sunday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM. Always ready for you.

items.title: 10 Buggies Ready
items.desc: Fleet of 10 fun open-air buggies, perfectly maintained for your island adventure.

steps.title: Book online in 3 min
steps.desc: Pick your date and how many people. $25 holds your buggy — nothing else needed.

steps.title: Dani texts you
steps.desc: You'll get a WhatsApp message confirming your pickup time and spot. Ask anything — she actually replies.

steps.title: Pick up & go
steps.desc: Full tank. Keys. A quick tip on where to head first. The island is yours.
steps.detail: All day · return whenever you're done

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Fun, safe, and ready to roll
fleet.description: Our open-air buggies are perfect for exploring Cozumel's stunning beaches, jungle roads, and colorful town. Each buggy fits up to 5 people and comes with full liability insurance.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, just fun
includesList: Full tank on pickup — must return full
pricing.depositNote: Secure with just a $25 deposit online. Pay the rest on pickup.

location.title: Where to Find Us
location.subtitle: Easy to reach, impossible to miss
location.meetingDesc: Carr. Costera Sur Km 4.3 (inside Pemex station), Cozumel, Q.R. — just minutes from the cruise ports.
location.hotelDesc: We deliver to select resorts on the island. Enter your hotel at checkout.

booking.title: Reserve Your Vehicle
booking.subtitle: Takes less than 3 minutes
booking.delivery: How will you pick up the vehicle(s)?
booking.pickupOption: I'll meet you at your office
booking.name: Full Name
booking.payDeposit: Pay $25 deposit now, rest on pickup
booking.waiverText: I confirm I hold a valid driver's license, am at least 18 years old, and agree to the rental terms including: safe operation of the vehicle, responsibility for traffic violations, return of the vehicle in its original condition, and that liability insurance covers third-party damages only. I understand the deposit is non-refundable in case of no-show.
booking.waiverAccept: I have read and agree to the rental agreement
booking.successDesc: Your buggy is reserved. We've sent a confirmation to your email and WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: The most fun way to explore Cozumel.

items.q: Do I need a driver's license?
items.a: Yes, the driver must have a valid driver's license. We'll collect the license number at booking.

items.q: Can I book for my cruise stop?
items.a: Absolutely! We're located right across from the main cruise ports. Just enter your arrival date and cruise ship info and we'll coordinate with your schedule.
Cozumel weather is usually sunny! In the rare case of severe weather, we'll work with you to reschedule.

items.q: How many people fit in a buggy?
items.a: Up to 5 people per buggy. If your group is larger, we'll assign multiple buggies at the same rate.
Yes! Liability insurance is included in the $75/day price. This covers third-party damages.

items.q: Can you deliver to my hotel?
items.a: Yes, we offer delivery to select resorts on the island. Just enter your hotel at checkout and we'll confirm availability.
